name: Harmonizer
description: Provides spell manacost reduction and spell amplification based on the cooldown status of spells.

effects.primary: Gain 5% spell manacost reduction for every spell off cooldown and 5% spell amplification for every spell on cooldown. Manacost Reduction per Spell Off Cooldown: 6.5%. Spell Amplification per Spell On Cooldown: 7.8%.
